records.title: standard_user logs out from the menu and returns to the login page
records.acText: An authenticated user opens the header burger menu, clicks Logout, and is returned to the login screen (URL /).

records.title: direct access to /inventory.html while logged out is blocked with an error
records.acText: With no active session, opening /inventory.html redirects to the login screen (URL /), shows 'Epic sadface: You can only access '/inventory.html' when you are logged in.', and flags both credential fields with error styling.

records.title: back button after logout does not restore the session
records.acText: After logging out, pressing the browser Back button does not restore the session — the route guard redirects to the login screen (URL /) with its error instead of the previously authenticated page.
